response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the performer as Nakiri Ayame based on her character model and the on-screen text #百鬼あやめ7周年新衣装3D.
2. Identified the song title "百花繚乱" (Hyakka Ryoran) from the on-screen text in the top-left corner.
3. Attempted to search for "百花繚乱" and "必ず導き出すから" lyrics for Nakiri Ayame, but was unable to find definitive lyrics online, thus set them to null.
4. Divided the video into two main scenes: the song performance (00:00-01:34) and the subsequent talk/outfit showcase (01:35-04:54).
response.global_summary: A performance of the song "百花繚乱" (Hyakka Ryoran) by the VTuber Nakiri Ayame, followed by an interval where she showcases her new 3D outfit and talks to the audience.

scenes.description: Nakiri Ayame performs the song "百花繚乱" on stage in a 3D environment. Text "百花繚乱" appears in the top-left corner.
Nakiri Ayame talks to the audience, showcasing her new 3D outfit and discussing the performance and concert title "天女繚乱" (Tennyo Ryoran).
